intro.title: Your Wins
intro.subhead: Turn what you have done into proof — and see how ready you are to ask for a raise.
intro.outcome: You will get a list of your wins, a readiness meter, and a ready-to-use script for asking for a raise.

page.wins_why: Think about the last year or two. What did you do that made things better? List one win per box — a number makes it stronger.
page.readiness_why: Be honest about where you are. There are no wrong answers.

wins.action_ph: e.g., Trained the new team members
wins.result_label: What changed? Use a number if you can.
wins.result_ph: e.g., Cut training time by 30%, or saved 5 hours a week

readiness.q1: I can name specific results I have delivered at work.
readiness.q2: I know what people in my role usually get paid.
readiness.q3: I feel ready to start the conversation with my manager.
readiness.q4: I can explain why I have earned more, with examples.

building.name: Building your case
building.desc: You are gathering your proof. Keep collecting wins and pay information — every one makes your case stronger.

getting_ready.name: Getting ready
getting_ready.desc: You have a real start. Practice saying your wins out loud, and look up typical pay for your role.

ready.name: Ready to ask
ready.desc: You know your wins and your worth. Use the script below to start the conversation.

script.open: I would like to set up a short time to talk about my work and my pay.
script.evidence_empty: For example, let me walk you through the results I delivered this year.
script.ask: Based on results like this, I would like to talk about a raise or a promotion.

results.title: Your Wins
results.narrative_h: Here's what we heard about you
results.narrative_body: These are real things you did — with numbers, not just adjectives. That is the proof you bring to any conversation about a raise or a new role.
results.wins_lead: Real things you did. Say these out loud until they feel natural.
results.wins_empty: You did not list any wins yet. Go back and add at least one — even a small one counts.
results.meter_h: How ready you are to ask
results.meter_lead: Asking for more is a skill you can build.
results.script_lead: A simple way to start the conversation. Change the words to sound like you.
results.cta_body: Take these wins and this script to the Career Growth workshop. Your CSC specialist can help you practice.
results.cta_link: Go to the Career Growth workshop →
